description:
**Past Performers & Attendees Include:**

Above & Beyond – Afrojack – Alan Walker – Alok – Armin van Buuren – Becky Hill – Bebe Rexha – Bonnie X Clyde – Cedric Gervais – Cheat Codes – Cloone – D.O.D – David Guetta – deadmau5 – Diplo – Dom Dolla – FISHER – Frank Walker – Fred again.. – Galantis – Gryffin – HALIENE – Hardwell – Hayla – HUGEL – Illenium – James Hype – Jex – Joel Corry – John Summit – Justice – Kaskade – Knock2 – KSHMR – Loud Luxury – Marshmello – Martin Garrix – Mau P – MEDUZA – NERVO – Oliver Heldens – Subtronics – The Chainsmokers – Tiësto – Vinny Vibe – Zara Larsson – Zedd + more

Step into the ultimate Music Week experience at the EDMA Pool Party, hosted poolside at the iconic Clevelander South Beach. This is where electronic music’s biggest names, industry tastemakers, celebrities, and fans collide under the Miami sun.

Powered by iHeartRadio and leading into Ultra Music Festival weekend, the EDMA Pool Party delivers nonstop, high-energy performances and unforgettable surprise moments in a luxury day-party atmosphere overlooking Ocean Drive.

Rub elbows with celebrities, A-list DJs, and industry executives while enjoying power-packed sets from this year’s winners and some of the hottest names in electronic music. No long speeches. No slow moments. Just pure energy from start to finish.

With Miami’s ocean views as your backdrop, immerse yourself in an exclusive experience that has become a must-attend destination for EDM superfans and insiders alike.

If you want to be where the industry actually gathers during Music Week - this is it.

tickets.name: Skip The Line Pass
tickets.description:
**EDMAs Skip-the-Line Priority Ticket**

This **Skip-the-Line Priority Ticket is a General Admission (GA) ticket that allows you to bypass the Free RSVP General Admission line and enter the EDMAs through the priority entrance**, giving you faster and more reliable access to the event. **This ticket alone grants you entry to the EDMAs and no additional RSVP, ticket, or pass is required.** **All proceeds from these Skip-the-Line Priority Tickets will be donated to Hope Bridge USA.** This access pass also allows you to **pick up your credentials early at any SHIFT Miami ticket check-in location in the days prior to the event**, so you can arrive already credentialed and avoid dealing with check-in the day of the event. A **very limited number** of these Priority Tickets are available for guests who want to guarantee smoother entry without waiting in the Free RSVP General Admission line. While standard EDMA invitations and RSVPs are complimentary, they operate on a **first-come, first-served basis and are subject to venue capacity**, which may result in long lines or delayed entry during peak arrival times. If you want to **guarantee faster entry and avoid waiting**, this ticket allows you to bypass the general admission line and use the **Skip-the-Line priority entrance**. If you already have a **free RSVP ticket, SHIFT Miami Access Pass, or EDMA Multi Pass**, you may still purchase this Skip-the-Line Priority Ticket to upgrade your entry experience. Each Skip-the-Line ticket is **valid for one individual only**, and **every person must have their own Skip-the-Line ticket** to use the priority entrance—one guest cannot purchase a ticket and bring additional people through the priority line. **Doors open at 11:00 AM** and the event is **21+**. **All sales are final with no refunds**, the event takes place **rain or shine**, and **chargebacks or payment disputes will not be honored**. The **terms and conditions for this ticket are the same as those governing the SHIFT Miami Pool Party tickets**, and by purchasing this ticket you agree to those same terms and conditions, so please review the SHIFT Miami Pool Party ticket terms for full details.

description:
It's time for another battle of best of south Florida! On this BB Sundays we celebrate 305 & 954 dance culture! Special guest hosts, and live dance competition. Come ready to jook.

For the past 10 years, Beyond Brunch Sundays has evolved into South Florida’s #1 urban brunch experience. This isn’t just a brunch; it’s a cultural movement! We’ve expanded to feature celebrity guest performers, creative themed events, and the ultimate vibes that keep our guests coming back every week.

Themes like Dukes & Boots, FreakNik, Divine 9, and our Camo Brunch keep each week fresh and exciting.

Complimentary bottle awarded to the Littest table of the day – bring the energy!

Enjoy creative games and unforgettable moments that make every Sunday unique.

At 5:30 PM, we transition into BB Sunsets a Caribbean-inspired day party to close out the evening.

***$50 includes unlimited food from 11 AM to 5 PM.***

The Menu

Our food offerings change weekly to complement the theme of the party! From BBQ ribs and chicken for Labor Day to special tequila drinks for Cinco de Mayo, we bring creativity to the table. Some staples include:

Shrimp & Grits

Chicken & Waffles

Lobster Mac & Cheese

Beef, Chicken, and Ham & Cheese Empanadas

Made-to-order Omelets

Carving Station featuring premium meats

Add mimosas at the bar for $20, or get complimentary unlimited mimosas from 11 AM - 1 PM with online ticket purchase!

Location:

Club Vault

2801 Greene Street Hollywood, FL

Reservations:

Call The Big Three at 754-400-0378.

✨ Sponsored by Efendee Studio– Use code FND for 10% off all services/bookings at [EfendeeStudio.com](http://efendeestudio.com/)!

Secure your spot now and join the brunch party that’s redefining Sundays!

description:
**DUMP TRUCK: SPRING BREAK FREAKNIK EDITION**

This edition is a vibrant, intentional space honoring the roots of the music and culture that inspire us — created for freedom, movement, and real energy on the dance floor.

**FREE RSVP FOR WOMEN. MEN WILL BE CHARGED $10.**

**PACKAGE DEAL: $300 - Bottle and Hookah - FROM 9-11 pm**

(Bottle choices include Don Julio Blanco, Don Julio Reposado, Hennessy, Patrón)

**ALL-WOMEN DJ LINEUP**

Amplifying the female sonic voices of South Florida:

@dj_kvass

@hii.rickyy

@djsyri

@siewave

Hosted by: Kameezy & Jazzy2x

**LOCATION:**

Smoke Wynwood

320 NW 24th St, Miami, FL 33127

**TIME:**

9PM – 3AM

**MIAMI MUSIC WEEK**

Come for the beats.

Stay for the energy.

Leave remembering what it feels like to actually celebrate culture.

Join us for **Coffee & Beats**, a unique **Miami Music Week daytime experience** where specialty coffee & cocktails meets house music culture.

Taking over Sky Coffee Buenos Aires from 5-10PM, this event blends the social energy of a daytime gathering with the rhythmic pulse of a proper dancefloor. Think of it as a **coffee rave**—not background chill music, but a vibrant atmosphere with **groove-driven house music**, uplifting energy, and a crowd that’s ready to move.

The soundtrack for the evening will feature a lineup of DJs delivering the type of music that defines Miami’s electronic scene: deep grooves, melodic moments, and high-energy house selections designed to keep the vibe elevated from sunset into the night.

**Lineup**\
Max White\
Dustin Penna\
Cicibi\
Alejandro Flores\
Droxe

NEIGHBORS

BY CREATIVES, FOR CREATIVES

INDUSTRY BASED EVENTS

FOCUSED ON INDUSTRY PEERS WANTS AND NEEDS FOR DIFFERENT EXPERIENCES AROUND OUR CITY

BROUGHT TO YOU BY WATERLOO GIN

JOIN US FOR AN EVENING OF

\-COMPLIMENTARY COCKTAILS

\-FREE PIZZA

\-WIN GUEST-LIST SPOTS TO SOME OF THE HOTTEST MMW EVENTS

*   OPEN DECKS LEAD BY EDGY

Subsolar Music teams up with DTLA Records for a late-night showcase bringing together cutting-edge house sounds from both coasts. On Wednesday, March 25th, we take over Cucu’s Nest in Miami Beach for an intimate, high-energy session featuring a stacked lineup of artists from both labels.

Expect driving basslines, hypnotic grooves, rolling percussion, and that raw underground energy that defines Miami Music Week. From deep and minimal to peak-time house heaters, this is a curated night built for true dance floor heads.

Two labels. One room. No filler.

Whether you’re in town for the week or a Miami local, this is where the real ones will be.

Doors open at 7PM Music goes late 21+

Follow Subsolar Music & DTLA Records for lineup announcements and ticket info.

We are so excited to be back at Miami Music Week with a massive line up of talented artists from all over the the world.

The event is free with RSVP and we cannot wait to see you all on the dance floor!

description:
***SHIFT* Miami** is the next evolution of Miami’s dance-music week, built for artists, industry, and fans who want real access, real connections, and unforgettable moments. Taking place during Miami’s annual dance-music week in March, *SHIFT* brings the global music community together for a **multi-day, multi-venue** run of events, showcases, networking opportunities, and cultural moments across Miami Beach—where rising talent meets industry power players through one-on-one sessions with key decision-makers, demo drops, meet & greets, poolside experiences, and intimate gatherings designed to create real opportunities, real connections, and unforgettable moments with performances from some of the world’s most sought-after DJs.

Last year, our team produced programming in Miami featuring world-class artists such as Above & Beyond, Afrojack, ALOK, Aluna, Armin van Buuren, Becky Hill, Bonnie x Clyde, Cedric Gervais, Cheat Codes, Crystal Waters, D.O.D, Frank Walker, Hardwell, HAYLA, Hugel, Joel Corry, KSHMR, Laidback Luke, Meduza, Sickick, Steve Aoki, Subtronics, and others—alongside industry leaders from 88rising, Armada, Beatport, Billboard, Defected, Dim Mak, DJ Mag, Dirtybird, EDM.com, Neon Owl, Red Light Management, Sony, SoundCloud, Splice, STMPD, Spotify, The Orchard, Ultra Records, Warner, Wasserman, and more. With *SHIFT* Miami, we’re bringing that same level of talent, access, and opportunity to a new experience built for today’s dance-music community.

**No gatekeepers. No limits. Just real access to the people, platforms, and opportunities that move dance music forward.**

**Insider Sessions & Industry Access**\
Experience intimate conversations with artists, innovators, and industry leaders shaping the future of electronic music. Step inside exclusive talks, mentorship moments, and behind-the-scenes insights designed to inspire, inform, and elevate your journey.

**Networking Without Barriers**\
Connect with A&Rs, managers, agents, curators, producers, DJs, vocalists, and music professionals through curated networking experiences built for real interaction, real collaboration, and real opportunity.

**Access to Exclusive Events**\
Your *SHIFT* pass includes entry to select parties, showcases, poolside events, and nightlife experiences — capped off with Friday, March 27th’s private EDMAs Pool Party. Since tickets to the EDMAs cannot be purchased and attendance is invite-only, your *SHIFT* pass provides access to this exclusive event alongside artists, industry, and VIP guests.

*SHIFT* offers multiple ticket types, and access may vary by pass. Some premium ticket types and add-on experiences will be announced at a later date. Your Access Pass gives you entry to the core *SHIFT* experience across participating venues in South Beach. As new experiences open, it will be up to you to reserve your spot or upgrade your pass if you’d like to join those activations. All events are subject to venue capacity, and early arrival or advance reservation is encouraged for popular sessions.

[Click here for SHIFT Miami 2026 - Ticketing Terms and Conditions](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/1ob54sci5hcage2s7hsr3/By-purchasing-you-agree-to-the-official-SHIFT-MIAMI-Terms-Conditions-Liability-Waiver-PDF.pdf?rlkey=h1xhfkrblkvoa9xfotrwjgrrx&dl=0)

tickets.name: SHIFT Access - $99.95 (Early Bird)
tickets.description:
**Limited Quantity Available**

Your **_SHIFT_ Access Pass** is your entry into the heart of Miami’s dance-music week — giving you access to the official _SHIFT_ events happening **Tuesday through Friday (March 24–27, 2026)** at **The Clevelander South Beach**, plus newly added events across other South Beach partner venues as they’re announced.

**Included with your Access Pass:**

• Entry to **Thursday’s _SHIFT_ Pool Party** and the **EDMAs Pool Party (Friday, March 27)** at The Clevelander South Beach (subject to venue capacity – early arrival recommended)

• Access to additional **official _SHIFT_ events** taking place Tuesday–Friday at The Clevelander and partner locations throughout South Beach

• Admission to **label and A&R events** featuring live _Demo Drops_ — submit your track, have it heard on-site, and connect directly with the people behind today’s biggest labels and rosters

• Access to **daytime programming**, including insider sessions, mentorship moments, and exclusive talks with artists and industry leaders

• Access to **curated networking experiences** with A&Rs, managers, agents, producers, DJs, vocalists, and music professionals

• Entry to **select showcases and nightlife experiences** (subject to venue capacity)

• Ability to **reserve spots for new sessions and activations** as they’re announced

**• Access to the _SHIFT_ Artist Discovery Vault** — Ready for your shot? Every Access Pass holder may upload **one track or vocal** (released _or_ unreleased) into our **secure, private Artist Discovery Vault**. The vault is shared **privately** with **attending labels, A&Rs, managers, booking agents, and A-list DJs, producers & vocalists** throughout _SHIFT_ Miami

They’ll be listening all week — and your contact info is included, so **if you bring the heat, they can reach out directly** 

• Ongoing **lineup additions and partner reveals** included with your pass — more updates coming soon

**Note:** Event access (including pool parties and the EDMAs) is subject to venue capacity. Select experiences may require advance reservation. Early arrival is recommended for popular events. _SHIFT_ Miami’s 2026 schedule and programming are subject to change.

By purchasing, you agree to the official **SHIFT MIAMI — Terms, Conditions & Liability Waiver (PDF)**

description:
## **VØLTAGE HAUS**

**Music x Fashion x Art x Ink**

This Miami Music Week, three of Miami’s fastest-rising creative forces unite for one night only: **Sunset Penthouse x Donny’s Devil x SKN Tattoo Collective.**

We’re taking over Shiso in Wynwood from 7PM to 3AM. Think New York edge meets Tulum after-dark energy.

On the decks: a curated lineup of tech house, Latin house, and Afro house heavy hitters

**DRASEN · JØSHIBUYA · PENSIÓN · VITTØ VØN DØN + special guests**

Expect immersive fashion moments from Donny’s Devil models in rave couture, multiple live runway walks throughout the night, and exclusive tattoo experiences by SKN Tattoo Collective.

This is not just a party. It’s a collision of culture.

### **About the Collaborators**

**Sunset Penthouse**

Brickell-based DJ collective and creative community redefining Miami nightlife. Known for expressive penthouse gatherings and luxury venue takeovers including Giselle and Rosa Sky, Sunset Penthouse curates high-vibration, underground-leaning music experiences with elevated energy.

**Donny’s Devil**

A Miami-based creative community centered on women’s empowerment and bold self-expression. Blending fashion, events, and artistic collaboration, Donny’s Devil brings fearless energy to every space they enter.

**SKN Tattoo Collective**

An upscale private studio where ink becomes intimate storytelling. SKN merges fine artistry with meticulous craftsmanship, offering a refined, immersive tattoo experience.

Enjoy the vibes on the sand. Bottle service and large group options available on <https://joiabeachmiami.com/> 

Event is 21+. Proper attire required and access to doorman's discretion.

Your Miami Music Week starts in the heart of South Beach as Max White kicks off his first event of the week outside J’adore on Ocean Drive. From 2PM to 7PM, this daytime celebration brings Miami Music Week energy directly to the street, designed to draw the beach crowd, the brunch crowd, and the nonstop flow of Ocean Drive into one stylish open-air setting.

With Max White leading the soundtrack and special guest Mila Rubio joining the day, expect a vibrant mix of sun-soaked atmosphere, polished South Beach style, and the elevated energy that defines Miami Music Week. Set just steps from the beach, the vibe is social, chic, and built for the daytime — where great music, a beautiful crowd, and that unmistakable Miami backdrop all come together.

More refined than a typical day party but still made to feel alive and energetic, this is the perfect way to start the week: outside, in the middle of the action, and fully immersed in the spirit of South Beach.

description:
You’ve found your way into something special.

This Saturday, we’re opening the doors to a world we’ve been building for months. We are stepping away from our regular routine to celebrate the premiere of human ERROR, a short film by our own Iyo Aghedo (@from.iyo).

What makes this night unique is YOU. This is a rare opportunity to fully express yourself in a space that loves and welcomes every version of you. We are all showing up as characters in the human ERROR universe, a story about an unexpected romance that reminds us how beautiful our "imperfections" really are.

The Invitation: Come As You Are Not This isn’t about a dress code; it’s about an invitation to play. We’re all dressing up to celebrate the film’s vision, think editorial, expressive, and otherworldly. Look to the incredible models in our community for inspiration and bring your most creative self to the floor.

The Atmosphere A cinematic sanctuary. The energy is soulful, urban, and high-vibration. Our selectors Hii Rickyy and K-vass are curating a journey through the sounds we love, Hip-Hop, R&B, Reggae, and Global Beats.

Whether you’re a local regular or just touching down for the week if you like to celebrate film, fashion, and each other, this if for you!

The Details

*   Wednesday: Catch the human ERROR premiere at FilmGate Festival.
*   Saturday: The Official Celebration @ Mangrove Miami (103 NW 1st Ave).

Sounds & Hosting: Hii Rickyy, K-vass, and our host Iyo Aghedo.

Dinner: Reservations at Mangrove are open until 11PM. The Party: 11PM – 3AM.

description:
The night rises above Wynwood at Astra Rooftop, located at 2121 NW 2nd Ave, Miami, FL 33127.

Inspired by the goddess of the stars, Astra is Miami’s premier open-air rooftop destination, where Mediterranean elegance meets the electric pulse of Miami Music Week. With sweeping skyline views, handcrafted cocktails, and elevated Mediterranean cuisine, Astra sets the stage for unforgettable moments under the Miami sky.

For Miami Music Week 2026, a full week of world-class talent takes over the rooftop as the most celebrated artists in dance music guide us on a sonic journey high above the city, offering what many consider the best view of the Miami skyline. Each night brings a refined yet high-energy experience, blending global headliners and rising selectors into a seamless progression of sound

From deep and hypnotic grooves to peak-hour intensity, every set is intentional, building momentum and holding the rooftop from start to finish. As the skyline glows and the terrace comes alive, the rhythm unites the crowd beneath the stars. Astra is not just a party, it is where music, atmosphere, and Miami nightlife meet at full elevation.

Guests are encouraged to bring positive energy and respect for the space and one another.

21+ only. All ticket sales are final.

eventTitle: Ableton Live Workshop w/ Michael Cupino (Miami Music Week)
description:
**ABLETON LIVE WORKSHOP — MIAMI**

Join us for a special daytime workshop led by Michael Cupino, an official certified trainer for Ableton.

This hands-on session is designed for DJs, producers, and artists looking to expand their creative workflow using Ableton Live.

During this workshop, Michael will break down how to:

• Create live remixes and edits  
• Build hybrid DJ + Ableton performance sets  
• Trigger stems, loops, and effects in real time  
• Transition from DJing into live production  
• Use Ableton as a performance tool—not just a DAW

Whether you're just getting started or already producing, this session will give you practical tools you can immediately apply.

WHO SHOULD ATTEND
-----------------

• DJs looking to level up their sets  
• Producers wanting to perform live  
• Artists interested in remixing and live edits  
• Creators curious about Ableton Live

WHAT TO EXPECT
--------------

• Live demonstration from a certified trainer  
• Real-world performance techniques  
• Q&A session  
• Networking with other DJs and producers

IMPORTANT INFO
--------------

• Limited capacity for a focused experience  
• Bring a notebook or laptop (optional)  
• Doors open at 12:45 PM  
• Workshop starts promptly at 1:00 PM

BONUS
-----

Attendees will also have the opportunity to connect with artists and producers participating in the evening Beat Gallery showcase.
shortDescription: Learn how to remix, perform, and build live sets using Ableton Live 12!

eventTitle: Clean The Beat at Joia Beach by ByeBye Plastic
description:
CLEAN THE BEAT – OFFICIAL AFTERPARTY

Presented by Bye Bye Plastic Foundation

Join us at Joia Beach for an afternoon where purpose meets rhythm.

Following a shoreline cleanup led by the Bye Bye Plastic Foundation, we continue the movement with an exclusive beachfront afterparty—bringing together music, community, and conscious celebration.

Set against the backdrop of the Miami skyline, Clean The Beat is more than just a party—it’s a statement. A moment to connect, recharge, and celebrate sustainability through sound.

Expect:

*   Curated house & electronic sounds
*   Oceanfront vibes & high-energy atmosphere
*   A like-minded, forward-thinking crowd
*   Seamless transition from impact to experience

Line Up:

Camz

Yulia Niko

Event Details:

Friday, March 27th

12:00PM – 3:00PM

Joia Beach

Come for the cause. Stay for the music.

eventTitle: MIAMI MUSIC WEEK SUNSET PARTY PRESENTED BY BURGUNDY. TROPA DO MIAMI. INFLUENCE RADIO
description:
MIAMI MUSIC WEEK SUNSET PARTY
-----------------------------

To close out **Miami Music Week**, [**Burgundy.xyz**](http://Burgundy.xyz), **Tropa Do Miami** and **INFLUENCE RADIO** come together for a sunset gathering at **Conventillo Bar**.

From **3PM–9PM**, we’re bringing together sounds that define Miami’s dancefloor right now where **Latin, Caribbean, and global music intersect**.

Expect a blend of **Miami Bass, Afro House, Reggaeton, Amapiano, Brazilian Funk, R&B, and Hip Hop**, reflecting the rhythms that move through the city every weekend.

As the sun sets on the final day of Miami Music Week, the music shifts through the sounds that have shaped Miami’s nightlife and cultural identity.

This night is built around the idea that **Miami’s music culture has never belonged to just one genre** it lives somewhere between all of them.

eventTitle: TEGI x DTLA Presents Great Moments in Miami @ Arlo Wynwood
description:
TEGI x Deep Tech Los Angeles present Great Moments in Miami.

Join us Friday, March 27 from noon to 7PM at Higher Ground, located on the 3rd floor rooftop of the Arlo Wynwood, for an afternoon of rooftop house music in the heart of Wynwood.

The lineup features TEGI, Redux Saints, Casmalia, Basura Boyz, Doc Brown, Jay Bird, Cristi Hernz, and Nikko delivering a full afternoon of house grooves above the city.

Sponsored by Great Moments, New Life Sounds, and Vital.
